name: XPG KYBER 850W 80 Plus Gold Gaming Power Supply
highlights: KYBER power supply units adhere to the Intel ATX 3.0 design guide specifications and offering a 12VHPWR connector at 750 and 850 wattage category, KYBER can support the latest graphics cards, made specifically for those who require high graphic capability and performance.
KYBER series power supply units 80 PLUS GOLD certified, achieving up to 91.40% (115V) efficiency at 50% load.

The intelligent fan-curve ensures quiet operation in a majority of user scenarios. By starting the fan control at a low RPM, achieving less noise and a much longer lifespan for both the fan and the overall PSU.
KYBER is protected by 8 industrial-level mechanisms and backed up by a 5-Year Warranty to ensure the safety and stability of both the unit and the system
XPG KYBER SERIES is certified by Cybenetics for its efficiency and noise level, scoring at the top of its category in both ETA and LAMBDA standards
description: XPG KYBER 850W 80 Plus® Gold Gaming Power Supply Price in Pakistan Specification Details Model XPG KYBER 850W Power Output 850 Watts Efficiency Rating 80 Plus Gold Form Factor ATX Cooling 140mm Silent Fan Modularity Fully Modular Connectors 1 x 24-Pin ATX 2 x 8-Pin PCIe (6+2) 1 x 8-Pin CPU (4+4) 6 x SATA 4 x Molex Protection Features OVP, UVP, OCP, SCP Input Voltage 100-240V AC Frequency Range 50-60Hz Dimensions (L x W x H) 160mm x 150mm x 86mm Weight 2.1 kg MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures) 100
